ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* Country's ISO code (alpha-3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "standard_price_cad" REAL /* Standard price in CAD */,
  "product_category" INTEGER /* Product category */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category FOREIGN KEY ("product_category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "local_price" REAL /* Price of the product in local currency */,
  "vat_rate" REAL /* Applicable VAT rate in that country */,
  "local_currency_price" REAL /* Price of the product converted to local currency */,
  "price_difference" REAL /* Difference between standard price in CAD and local price */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the pricing */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the pricing */,
  "local_currency_code" TEXT /* Local currency code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "currency_from" TEXT /* Currency code being converted from */,
  "currency_to" TEXT /* Currency code being converted to */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate between the two currencies */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "exchange_rate_source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_from FOREIGN KEY ("currency_from") REFERENCES countries ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vat_rates" (
  "vat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VAT entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the VAT is applicable */,
  "vat_rate" REAL /* VAT rate applied in that country */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the VAT rate is effective */,
  "vat_rate_type" TEXT /* Type of VAT rate (standard, reduced, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vat_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "price_difference" REAL /* Calculated price difference */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (daily, weekly, monthly, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_analysis_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_analysis_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission granted to the role */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
